label: Transparent coelacanth scale motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a coelacanth scale motif as an isolated cutout source: a compact overlapping patch of coelacanth body scales with a subtle partial body contour, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: Ancient coelacanth scales, heavy lobed fish scale texture, steel blue plates, white mineral flecks, slate ridges, fossil-like archive patina, deep reef shadow, small pearlescent worn edges. The motif should read unmistakably as coelacanth scales rather than generic fish scales.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding, crisp silhouette, three-quarter texture view, no cropped edges.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves steel blue scale relief, white flecks, fossil archive neutrals, and deep shadow detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no ocean background, no bubbles, no decorative background, no full fish, no second subject, no cast shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode ancient archive board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Coelacanth" derived from ancient coelacanth scales.
Reference motif: overlapping coelacanth scale plates, steel blue body color, white mineral flecks, slate ridges, fossil archive neutrals, deep reef shadow, ancient preserved-fish texture. The system mood is "ancient archive system".
Canvas: exact 16:9 composition, 4K-class design-system source board, target 3840 x 2160. Crisp readable labels, large UI text, precise grid.
Required visible title text: "Morphous Coelacanth" and "Coelacanth Scales".
Required visible sections: Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Charts, Forms, Table, Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
UI coverage: left sidebar navigation with archive folders, top command/search bar, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, small stacked chart, status badges, alert, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, table rows with accession records, form panel, cards, loading/empty/error states, token swatches.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn product design system, quiet archive dashboard, fossil catalog UI, 8px radius, thin ruled borders, white fleck texture, scale-plate dividers, restrained shadow, no nested cards.
Color palette: fossil paper #f3f0e6, archive ivory #fffdf6, steel scale blue #496b80, deep reef navy #142432, slate ink #24323b, white fleck #f8f7ed, aged bone #d8d0bd, patina teal #6f9ca2, warning rust #9d6048. Use only these and close neutrals.
Text constraints: short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs; no watermark; no random brand names; no fake logos; do not misspell "Morphous Coelacanth".

label: Dark-mode deep reef archive board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Coelacanth". It must feel like the dark translation of the same ancient coelacanth scale archive system, not a new theme.
Reference motif: ancient overlapping coelacanth scale plates, steel blue body color, white mineral flecks, slate ridges, fossil archive neutrals, deep reef shadow. The system mood is "ancient archive system".
Canvas: exact 16:9 composition, 4K-class design-system source board, target 3840 x 2160. Crisp readable labels, large UI text, precise grid.
Required visible title text: "Morphous Coelacanth" and "Dark Archive".
Required visible sections: Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Charts, Forms, Table, Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
UI coverage: left sidebar navigation with archive folders, top command/search bar, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, small stacked chart, status badges, alert, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, table rows with accession records, form panel, cards, loading/empty/error states, token swatches.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics.
Visual style: deep reef navy and slate ink surfaces, steel blue controls, white fleck highlights, aged bone muted text, patina teal focus rings, rust destructive state, scale-plate texture, quiet museum archive dashboard, thin ruled borders, 8px radius, restrained glow, no nested cards.
Color palette: deep reef navy #142432, abyss ledger #0c141b, slate ink #24323b, steel scale blue #496b80, pale fleck #f8f7ed, aged bone #d8d0bd, patina teal #6f9ca2, fossil paper #f3f0e6, warning rust #9d6048. Use only these and close neutrals.
Text constraints: short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs; no watermark; no random brand names; no fake logos; do not misspell "Morphous Coelacanth".
